generalInfo.description: This luxurious and charming hotel offers elegant accommodation, just a 10-minute drive away from the beautiful Kuta beach and close to other places of interest. The property offers a complimentary scheduled shuttle service to Discovery Shopping Mall for those who might be interested in discovering it. The modern air-conditioned rooms are completely fitted to guarantee a pleasant stay, featuring a seating area, a desk and a wardrobe. An electric kettle along with a refrigerator and a flat-screen cable TV are also provided for guests’ convenience. Moreover, the en suite bathrooms come equipped with a shower, hairdryer and slippers. Guests can also sample a selection of Indonesian and international dishes, while light meals and refreshing beverages can be enjoyed at the on-site lounge bar. Alternatively, guests can order from the 24-hour room service.

paymentOptionList.name: Pay at Hotel (with credit card)
paymentOptionList.description:
You can book now and pay upon or before check-in, depending on the accommodation's policy.

  • The payment will be charged in the accommodation's local currency.
  • Credit card details are required to guarantee the booking. The payment billing time will depend on the accommodation's policy, it may occur upon or before check-in.
  • The payment amount will follow the exchange rate on the billing date.
  • Please confirm your time of arrival with the accommodation to avoid booking cancellation.
  • To avoid booking cancellation by the accommodation, please ensure the credit or debit card holder's name matches the name of one of the guests listed on the e-voucher.

paymentOptionList.name: Pay at Hotel (without credit card)
paymentOptionList.description:
You can book now and pay upon check-in.

  • The payment will be charged in the accommodation's local currency.
  • The payment amount will follow the exchange rate on the billing date.
  • Please confirm your arrival time with the accommodation to avoid booking cancellation.

preferredPartner.title: Preferred Partner
preferredPartner.subtitle: tiket.com selected and trusted accommodations with good reviews.

contents.description:
Best Western Resort Kuta offers a 4-star accommodation located just a step away from Discovery Shopping Mall. This 4-star hotel boasts an open-air restaurant and a wellness centre on-site. Complimentary WiFi is accessible throughout the property.

The air-conditioned rooms at Best Western Resort Kuta come with either a garden view or a pool view. Room amenities include coffee/tea making facilities, a minibar, a safety deposit box and a seating area with a sofa. The en suite bathroom comes with bathrobes and complimentary toiletries. Interconnecting rooms are available upon request. 

Dine at Ambrosia Restaurant and enjoy authentic Balinese and International dishes served at breakfast, lunch and dinner. Refreshing cocktails and light meals are served at the hotel bar. Best Western Resort Kuta also offers a 24-hour in-room dining service. 

Guests can rejuvenate with massages and spa treatments at the wellness centre. Take a dip at the outdoor swimming pool. Other facilities include a 24-hour front desk, concierge service and a business centre. Luggage storage and a tour desk are available at the property. Daily housekeeping is provided 

Best Western Resort Kuta within 4 minutes’ walk from Kuta Beach and 15 minutes’ drive from Kuta Beach and Kuta Art Market. Ngurah Rai International Airport is 2 km away from the property. Airport transfers are available at a surcharge.

preferredPartner.title: Preferred Partner
preferredPartner.subtitle: tiket.com selected and trusted accommodations with good reviews.

contents.description:
Located a 14-minute walk from Kuta Art Market, 18 Suite Villa Loft by AMITHYA is a 4-star property with a Balinese pattern in the decoration. The villa offers a swimming pool, a bar and a one-time poolside high tea. As a guest, you have access to free on-site parking and all-area WiFi.

Decorated with tasteful colors and patterns, the air conditioned rooms feature a private entrance, a safe and a minibar. Each room has coffee/tea making facilities, a sofa and a flat-screen cable TV. The private bathroom provides a hairdryer, towels and free toiletries. Some rooms have a private pool.

Offering a la carte international dishes and a snack bar, the on-site restaurant serves daily Continental breakfast at individual villas. Floating breakfast is available by request. You can also use the barbecue facilities and order champagne.

Guests can make use of the property's bikes or arrange day trips with the tour desk. Access to a water park is also available. When staying in, you can pamper yourself at the spa facilities. The property offers laundry and dry cleaning with extra charge.

18 Suite Villa Loft by AMITHYA is 14.8 km from Waterblow and 22.2 km from Uluwatu Temple, while Jimbaran Beach is a 16-minute drive from the hotel. Ngurah Rai International Airport is a 6-minute drive and the property can arrange a paid airport transfer for you.

Grand Ixora Resort Kuta is located 2 km from Kuta Beach, Bali. The hotel features an outdoor swimming pool and a wellness centre. Stay connected with complimentary WiFi throughout the entire property. 

Spacious and air conditioned rooms offer an array of room amenities such as a flat-screen TV with multiple channels, a minibar and a coffee maker. Two complimentary bottled water are also provided. The ensuite bathroom fits a shower and free toiletries. Slippers and towels are also featured. 

Bambu Roras Restaurant offers a wide range of Asian and International delights. Breakfast buffet is also served at this restaurant. Unwind over refreshing drinks by the pool at the Pool Bar. Room service is available for guests who love dine in their room. 

Re-energize your body after strolling around at Jasmine Spa. Grand Ixora Resort Kuta offers different guest activities every day such as cooking class, dancing class, music class and making Balinese offering. Car rental is also available at a surcharge. 

Ngurah Rai International Airport is 2 km away from Grand Ixora Resort Kuta. Double Six Beach and Seminyak Beach are 7 km from the hotel. Discovery Shopping Mall is 600 metre while Waterbom Bali is 700 metre from the accomodation. Potato Head Beach Club is 10 km from the property.

Located in Kuta, the 3-star Febris Hotel & Spa provides hotel accommodation conveniently situated within a 4-minute drive to the popular Kuta Beach. The hotel features an outdoor swimming pool, an on-site restaurant and spa facilities. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.

Warmly lit air-conditioned rooms at the hotel are equipped with a LCD TV, a full-zise refrigerator and coffee/tea making facilities. Private bathrooms are fitted with a shower and include a hair dryer and towels. All rooms come with a private terrace or a balcony with garden views.

Guests staying at Febris Hotel & Spa can enjoy dining on a selection of Indonesian and international dishes served at the on-site restaurant. Guests can dine at the restaurant while accompanied by live music in the evening.

When it’s time to unwind, guests can enjoy a refreshing swim in the outdoor swimming pool. Guests can also relax with a rejuvenating massage or spa treatment at Febri’s Spa. Guests can approach hotel staff to assist with diving, fishing and horseback riding activities for leisure.

For shopping, guests can walk 6 minutes to reach Discovery Shopping Mall. Guests can walk 7 minutes to visit Waterbom Bali Indonesia for recreation. Febris Hotel & Spa is located within a 4-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport.

preferredPartner.title: Preferred Partner Plus
preferredPartner.subtitle: Popular, high-demand, and highly-rated places selected by tiket.com.

contents.description:
EDEN Hotel Kuta Bali presents a cosy stay with an outdoor pool, a kids' pool and meeting/banquet facilities. The hotel is situated just a walking distance to Kuta's Discovery Shopping Mall and the famed Waterbom waterpark. Guests can also enjoy access to free WiFi in all areas. 

Decorated with shades of bright green colours, the air-conditioned rooms at EDEN Hotel Kuta Bali provide comfortable space to relax. Each one also comes with a minibar, tea/coffee making facilities, a seating area and a flat-screen cable TV. The en suite bathroom is equipped with shower facilities and free toiletries. Certain rooms offer a separate living room with a sofa and dining area. 

The on-site 360 Lounge & Bistro serves a wide variety of international and Indonesian dishes. Guests can also opt for refreshing drinks by the pool at the Sunken Pool Bar or a fresh cup of coffee at Dripz Coffee. Sweet treats and pastries can be found at Bread & Butter. 

Providing a 24-hour front desk with concierge service, EDEN Hotel Kuta Bali also houses a business centre and a gift shop. The friendly staff can also help guests to arrange car hire and laundry requests at additional charges. Free valet parking service and on-site parking are offered to guests with cars. 

Beachwalk shopping centre is a 5-minute drive from the hotel. Getting to Ngurah Rai International Airport will take around 10 minutes by car. Airport transfers can be arranged at a fee.

Located in the lively Kuta area of Bali, The Rani Hotel and Spa welcomes guests with an outdoor swimming pool, on-site restaurants and a spa. The property is strategically located within a 13-minute drive to Kuta Beach and a 5-minute walk to Lippo Mall Kuta for shopping. Free WiFi access is available throughout the property.

Rooms at the hotel showcase a classic contemporary feel and are equipped with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with cable channel access and coffee/tea making facilities. En suite bathrooms provide guests with a shower and bathtub, towels and complimentary toiletries. Select rooms provide a pleasant view of the hotel pool.

While staying at The Rani Hotel and Spa, guests can enjoy dining at Kenanga Restaurant & Bar which serves a buffet breakfast and a variety of Indonesian and Western dishes and refreshments. In-room dining is available from room service for further convenience.

Guests at the hotel can unwind on the sun loungers by the outdoor swimming pool or enjoy a refreshing swim. Guests can also relax by booking a rejuvenating massage or enjoying spa treatment at the hotel’s Aroma Massage & Spa. Meeting/banquet facilities are also available for hosting events.

For more shopping, guests can walk 6 minutes to reach Discovery Shopping Mall from the property. Guests can also walk 7 minutes from the hotel to visit Waterbom Bali Indonesia. The Rani Hotel and Spa is located within an 8-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport.

contents.hotelName: The Vira Bali Boutique Hotel & Suite
contents.description:
Situated in South Kuta Beach, The Vira Bali Boutique Hotel & Suite is 800 metre away from Discovery Shopping Mall. The boutique hotel features an outdoor pool and a gym. Free WiFi is available throughout the entire property. 


Elegant rooms are appointed with a flat-screen cable TV, a minibar and a seating area. A coffee maker and complimentary bottled water are also available. The en suite bathroom is fitted with a shower, a hairdryer. Each room has a private balcony overlooking the pool. 


WAGA Kuta Bali offers International cuisines. Guests can dine in their room with room service that available from 7.00 AM - 11.00 PM by last order at 10.00 PM.


Pamper your body after a tiring day with relaxing massages at The Spa. Tours and car rental can be arranged at the tour desk, The Vira Bali Boutique Hotel & Suite offers free airport pickup. Daily housekeeping is offered daily and laundry service is available with additional cost.  


Ngurah Rai International Airport is a 10-minute drive from The Vira Bali Boutique Hotel & Suite. Waterbom Bali is 10 minutes’ walk while Seminyak Beach and Double Six Beach are 7 km away from the hotel. Potato Head Beach Club is 11 km away from the property.

Situated 4 minutes’ walk from Discovery Shopping Mall, Amnaya Resort Kuta welcomes you to an unwind retreat in Kuta. The 4-star resort boasts holistic spa treatments and an outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is accessible in all areas for staying guests.

Featuring a warm colour palette, the spacious rooms at Amnaya Resort Kuta are equipped with a private balcony and a seating area. In-room amenities include a coffee and tea maker, a minibar and a flat-screen TV with cable channels. The en suite bathroom is fitted with a rain shower, a hairdryer and bathroom amenities. Bathrobes and an in-room safe are also provided. Some rooms have direct access to the swimming pool.

Enjoy classic healthy food made from fresh ingredients for breakfast at Sukun Restaurant and Bar. Featuring large trays of appetisers, main courses and Aromatic Bali Coffee, Megibung can also be catered at this open-air restaurant for guests to experience the traditional Balinese culinary. Complimentary afternoon tea accompanied with Balinese cakes are served for in-house guests.

Amnaya Resort Kuta offers plenty of art and cultural activities such as Jamu making, Balinese handicraft and painting classes. Guests can also participate in yoga classes and exercise at the fitness centre to stay active. Bicycle and car rentals are available on-site.

Amnaya Resort Kuta is a 15-minute walk from Segara Beach. Kuta Beach and Beachwalk Shopping Centre are 1.7 km away from the resort. Ngurah Rai International Airport is 2.3 km away and airport transfers are available at a surcharge.

Featuring an outdoor swimming pool and a spa, Green Garden Hotel & Spa is 2 km from Ngurah Rai International Airport and only within walking distance to Discovery Shopping Mall. This 3-star accommodation also provides free WiFi access in all areas.

Fitted with a balcony or a terrace, the air-conditioned rooms come with a flat-screen TV with international channels and in-house movies, a personal safe and a refrigerator. Free bottled water and coffee/tea makers are also included. The en suite bathrooms are equipped with a walk-in shower, a hairdryer and toiletries.

The restaurant serves various scrumptious Indonesian, Chinese and Western dishes for all-day dining and a room service is available. There is also a supermarket right next door from Green Garden Hotel & Spa should you need to grab some snacks and drinks.

Assistance with luggage storage, laundry service and car hire can be obtained from the friendly front desk staff. Other services provided by Green Garden Hotel & Spa include a concierge, a tour desk and a daily housekeeping.

Sprawling over 3.8 hectares of land, Waterbom Bali Indonesia is only within walking distance from Green Garden Hotel & Spa. Kuta Beach and Kuta Art Market can be reached within less than 5 minutes’ car ride from the hotel.

Bali Rani Hotel presents a cosy accommodation located right in the heart of lively Kuta just a 5-minute walk from the famous Waterbom waterpark. It also offers an outdoor swimming pool, a spa, and meeting facilities. Complimentary WiFi access is available in all areas of the property. 


Boasting a contemporary design with tiled flooring, every room is air-conditioned and fitted with a flat-screen cable TV. There is also tea/coffee making facilities, a personal safe and a seating area provided in all rooms. The private en suite bathroom comes with shower facilities and free toiletries. Some units lend a larger space with a separate living room with a sofa and views to the pool and surrounding area. 


The hotel's Teraswira Cafe serves daily buffet breakfast by the poolside while an array of delectable a la carte Asian and western dishes are offered at Brasserie Restaurant. For refreshing drinks and tasty light bites, guests can head down to Bali Rani Hotel's Segara Pool Bar. 


Other facilities available at this hotel include a fitness centre and free on-site private parking for guests who drive. The staff at the 24-hour front desk can assist guests with laundry requests, luggage storage, car hire and day tour arrangements at additional charges. 


The iconic Kuta Beach is about a 5-minute drive from Bali Rani Hotel while Garuda Wisnu Kencana Cultural Park is about a 30-minute drive away. Ngurah Rai International Airport is reachable within a 10-minute drive and airport shuttle service is available at a fee.

preferredPartner.title: Preferred Partner
preferredPartner.subtitle: tiket.com selected and trusted accommodations with good reviews.

contents.hotelName: Sun Island Hotel and Spa Kuta
contents.description:
Located in the heart of Kuta, Bali, Sun Island Hotel and Spa Kuta is a 6-minute drive from Kuta Beach. Located on a busy street, many shops and restaurants surround the property. Ngurah Rai International airport is only an 8-minute drive from the hotel. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the hotel.


The hotel’s rooms are modernly designed, air-conditioned, and come equipped with a flat-screen cable TV, coffee/tea making facilities, and an en suite bathroom. Some upgraded rooms have a bathtub in the ensuite bathroom and have a separate living and dining area. Interconnecting rooms are available upon request.


Sun Island Hotel and Spa Kuta’s on-site restaurant serves buffet breakfast each morning. The restaurant is open all day serving lunch and dinner with a wide variety of menu ranging from local specialities to international fine dining cuisine. In-room dining is also available at the hotel.


During their stay, guests can partake in various activities offered at the hotel, ranging from yoga to Balinese traditional art hand-crafting. Other facilities offered include a swimming pool, a fitness centre, and a wellness centre. The reception is open 24-hours, and free parking is available at the hotel.


Sun Island Hotel and Spa Kuta are within reach of many of Bali’s point of interests, Krisna souvenir centre is a 6-minute drive from the hotel, Jimbaran area is a 14-minute drive from the hotel, and Seminyak area can be reached via a 15-minute drive from the premises. Car services and airport shuttle services are available upon request.

Strategically located, only a 3-minute drive away from Kuta Beach and a 5-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport, Adhi Jaya Hotel Bali can be your accommodation choice while visiting Kuta, Bali. Every room in the hotel has either a balcony or a terrace, surrounded by a lush garden. Free WiFi is accessible throughout the property.      

Designed with a mixture of modern touches and wooden ornaments, each room at Adhi Jaya Hotel Bali has an AC, a flat-screen TV and a mini refrigerator. A coffee/tea making facility is also available for your comfort. Every bathroom has a hot shower and a hairdryer, while a bathtub is available in selected rooms.  

The hotel’s restaurant, Beras Merah Waroeng & Bar, serves 2 unique menus. One Metre Satay, a variety of satay, is served while guests listen to the beautiful sound of gamelan. Hanuman, a special mocktail, is served along with a Kecak dance performance. Guests are also invited to order drinks and snacks while relaxing at the hotel’s Orchid Pool Bar.   

Experience a carefree holiday at the hotel with a luggage storage, a currency exchange service and an ATM centre at the lobby. For an additional charge, the hotel also provides a laundry and ironing service. You can also unwind at Soka Spa, the hotel’s spa centre that offers a variety of treatments with traditional touches.    

Adhi Jaya Hotel Bali is only a 2-minute walk away from Discovery Shopping Mall and a 4-minute walk away from Waterbom Bali Indonesia. Both Legian and Seminyak Beach are within a 15-minute drive from the hotel.

The Tusita Hotel Bali offers a 3-star accommodation in Kuta, featuring an outdoor swimming pool and spa treatments. This hotel is located 10 minutes’ walk from Waterbom Bali Indonesia. Free WiFi and parking are available for in-house guests.

The air-conditioned rooms at The Tusita Hotel Bali are equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and have a garden view or a city view. Room amenities include a coffee and tea maker, a work desk and a mini fridge. The private bathroom is fitted with a shower and free toiletries. Some rooms have a balcony. Family rooms are also available.

The Tusita Resto serves local and international delicacies for breakfast and all-day dining, whereas refreshing beverages can be savoured at the poolside bar. A lot of other dining options can also be found within a walking distance from the area or you can always order from the room service menu.

This hotel also provides daily housekeeping, an ATM and 24-hour front desk. Day tours can be arranged. Bicycle and car rentals are available.

The Tusita Hotel Bali is located 1.6 km away from Segara Beach, Kuta Square and Kuta Art Market. Ngurah Rai International Airport is only a 3-minute drive from the hotel. Airport transfers are available at an additional charge.

reviews.innerHTMLContent:
Awaiting Review

Let’s book this accommodation and leave a review after your stay.

parsedUserAgent.ua: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

middlewareData.originalUserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

message.copySuccess: Link to the accommodation page copied.

noData.title: The photos will be ready soon
noData.description: The accommodation is preparing their best photos. Please come back later.

hotelInfo.checkOtherDate: All rooms are fully booked. Change the date or other details.
hotelInfo.changeYourSearch: This accommodation is temporarily closed. Let's try a different search!

loginInvitationBanner.title: Have you got an account?
loginInvitationBanner.description: Create one or log into it to enjoy member-only discounts & benefits!

roomSoldOutBanner.title: This place is fully booked
roomSoldOutBanner.description: Let’s choose the available dates below or adjust your stay dates.

locationSection.title: Location
locationSection.nearbyNote: All distances are measured in straight lines. The actual travel distance may be different.

withFilterCriteria.title: No rooms match your criteria
withFilterCriteria.description: Let's adjust the filter so you can find the accommodation that suits you. You can also check out other similar accommodations below.

noResult.title: This accommodation is fully booked
noResult.description: No worries! You can stay here on other dates. Let’s choose the available dates or adjust your stay dates to check the unit’s availability.

hasMixedList.title: Other room options for you
hasMixedList.description: Here are other room options that might suit your travel needs.

hasNoMixedList.title: No rooms match your search
hasNoMixedList.description: Let’s check out other rooms below that might suit your travel needs.

popupBookConfirmation.description: To accommodate the number of guests staying, we recommend you book this room type for {{roomAmountText}}.

popupLoyaltyBenefits.footer: For selected rooms. Go to room details to see the available benefits.

accommodationRules.title: Accommodation Rules
accommodationRules.earlyCheckin: Want to check in early? Fill out the Special Requests form on the booking page.

pdp.schemaPriceRange: starts from Rp.{{cheapest}}/night - Lowest Price Guarantee only on tiket.com!
pdp.schemaPriceRangeNoPrice: Lowest Price Guarantee only on tiket.com!

roomList.title: Rooms

searchBar.filterRelevantResults: Find more relevant results with filters:

roomList.reselectRoomMessage: Please return to the room list and reselect your desired room.

hotelInfo.checkOtherDate: This place is fully booked. Adjust the dates or other details.

roomList.entirePlaceDescription: You’ll have the entire unit to yourself.

roomRecommendation.recommendationDividerMobileLabel: You can also select the rooms below

popupConfirmation.title: Wanna book this recommended room?
popupConfirmation.description: You’re selecting the recommended room, which cannot be combined with other room types. If you book this option, the previous rooms will be removed from this booking.

popupNeedApproval.title: This order doesn’t meet the travel policy
popupNeedApproval.description: The administrator will review your order for approval. Continue to book?

calculationInfoBS.title: Chat Performance calculation
calculationInfoBS.content1: - Percentage is calculated from the number of chats replied to by the accommodation in the past 7 days. We only calculate replies made within 7 days after receiving guests' chats.
calculationInfoBS.content2: - Response time is the average time it takes for the accommodation to respond to all chats received in the past 7 days.

pdp.loadingMessage: Please wait! We’re making sure everything is set for you.

guestCapacity.description: To accommodate all guests, we recommend you book {{roomAmountText}} of this type.
guestCapacity.alternateBundling: If you select this room, your previous rooms will be deleted from this booking.

popUp.banner: You searched for {{guestCountText}}, while this room can accommodate {{maxGuestCountText}}.

refundInfo.freeUntil: Until {{date}}, refund or reschedule without any charges.
refundInfo.noRefund: On and after the check-in date ({{date}}), no refund or reschedule is allowed. If you don't show up for check-in, there is no refund.

popupBookConfirmationAlternate.title: Need more rooms to fit all guests
popupBookConfirmationAlternate.description: Book rooms that can accommodate all guests to avoid extra charges or check-in issues.
popupBookConfirmationAlternate.youSearchedFor: You searched for {{adultChildCount}} while this room can accommodate {{maxAdultChildCount}}.
popupBookConfirmationAlternate.importantInfoDescription: If the rooms can't accommodate all guests, extra charges or check-in issues may occur. Change your search to avoid this.

popupBookConfirmation.extraDescriptionText: If you select this room, your previous rooms will be deleted from this booking.

popupBookConfirmation.title: Continue to book {{roomAmount}} of the same room?
popupBookConfirmation.description: You’re selecting “Booking {{roomAmount}} of the same room”, but it can’t be combined with other room types. If you book this option, the previous rooms will be deleted from this booking.

leaveUnsavedChanges.title: Wanna leave this page?
leaveUnsavedChanges.description: If you leave this page, all the details you’ve selected and entered before will not be saved.

guestAmountNotFulfilled.title: Continue to book your rooms?
guestAmountNotFulfilled.description: You are seeking rooms for {{formattedMaxGuestAmount}}, but the selected rooms can only accommodate {{formattedCurrentGuestAmount}}.

roomAmountNotFulfilled.title: Continue to book your rooms?
roomAmountNotFulfilled.description: You’re looking for {{formattedMaxRoomAmount}} but have chosen only {{formattedCurrentRoomAmount}}.

description.room: You will stay on {{formattedDateRangeText}}. Choose the {{accommodationUnit}} and night you want to facilitate with Add-ons.
description.item: You will stay on {{formattedDateRangeText}}. Choose the {{accommodationUnit}} type and date you want to facilitate with Add-ons.

popupAddOnsFormNote.title: Add Note
popupAddOnsFormNote.description: Availability of Add-ons is determined by the accommodation party. You can add notes and we will forward it to the accommodation party.

message.alreadyMatchedMaxRoomTypeLimit: You can only choose a maximum of {{limitAmount}} room types.
message.alreadyMatchedRoomAmount: The total number of rooms selected matches the number you searched.
message.updatedRoomAmount: The total number of rooms you've selected for this room type: {{roomAmount}}

validation.duplicatedGuestFullName: The same guest name cannot be used multiple times in one order.

inAppMap.noPoiNearby: Looks like there are no interesting places around this accommodation.

noAccommodationNearby.title: No accommodations nearby
noAccommodationNearby.description: There are other interesting places around for you to check out!

noAccommodationAndPoiNearby.title: No accommodations nearby
noAccommodationAndPoiNearby.description: Let's view the details of this accommodation instead!

common.fullyBookedDescription: Let’s check the availability on other dates!

loading.title: Relax and take a breath
loading.description: We are processing your order. It might take a while.

homes.title: Rent Villas, Apartments, Lodging, Glamping - tiket.com
homes.description: Discover apartments, villas, and nearest lodging on tiket.com. Get villa & apartment promo with best room facilities, reviews and cheapest price here!

search.hotelTitle: tiket.com: Online Hotel Booking for Cheap, Budget and Luxury Hotels
search.hotelDescription: tiket.com: Best hotel site. The most complete & cheapest online hotel booking in Indonesia (Bali, Jakarta, Bandung, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Lombok) and so much more
search.homesTitle: Rent Villas, Apartments & Nearest Accommodation on tiket.com
search.homesDescription: Find villas, apartments, or other cheap accommodations with promo price for all room types. Check nearest accommodations and book now on tiket.com

hotel.title: {{hotel}}, {{city}} - Cheap Booking at tiket.com
hotel.description: Book {{hotel}}, {{city}}. Get the cheapest promo discounts, facilities, see the closest map & lodging reviews on tiket.com

hotelLandingPage.title: tiket.com: Online Hotel Booking for Cheap, Budget and Luxury Hotels
hotelLandingPage.description: tiket.com: Best hotel site. The most complete & cheapest online hotel booking in Indonesia (Bali, Jakarta, Bandung, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Lombok) and so much more.

bookingForm.title: Booking Form - tiket.com
bookingForm.hotelDescription: tiket.com: Best hotel site. The most complete & cheapest online hotel booking in Indonesia (Bali, Jakarta, Bandung, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Lombok) and so much more
bookingForm.homesDescription: Cheap lodging, villas, apartments, glamping with promo price! Check nearest lodging info, room facilities & accommodation reviews on tiket.com. Book now!

property.title: Rent {{propertyType}}s in {{name}} - Specials Promos & Discounts
property.titleRegion: Rent {{propertyType}}s in {{name}} - Get Special Promos & Discounts
property.description: Rent {{propertyType}} in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find apartment, villa, glamping & other accommodations with special discounts!

chain.description: Rent {{chainName}} {{propertyType}} on tiket.com. Find other {{chainName}} {{propertyType}} at your destination with the best discounts!

landing.description: Rent {{propertyType}} on tiket.com. Find other {{propertyType}} in your destination with the best discounts & facilities!

country.title: Hotels in {{name}} - Get Special Discounts & Promos
country.description: Book hotels in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find cheap hotels, 5-star hotels, and nearest accommodations in {{name}}. Book now!

region.title: Hotels in {{name}} - Get Special Discounts & Promos
region.description: Book hotels in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find cheap hotels, 5-star hotels, and nearest accommodations in {{name}}. Book now!

city.description: Book hotels in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find cheap hotels, 5-star hotels, and nearest accommodations in {{name}}. Book now!

area.description: Book hotels in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find cheap hotels, 5-star hotels, and nearest accommodations in {{name}}. Book now!

poi.title: Hotels Near {{name}} - Best Deals only on tiket.com
poi.description: Book hotels near {{name}}, {{subLocationName}}. Find cheap hotels, 5-star hotels, and nearest accommodations near {{name}}. Book now!

hotelchain.title: {{name}} Hotels - Get Best Deals on tiket.com
hotelchain.description: Booking {{name}} hotels on tiket.com. Find another {{name}} hotels in your favorite destination with best promos!

star.title: {{star}} Star Hotels in {{name}} - Get Special Promos & Discounts
star.description: Book {{star}} star hotels in {{name}} on tiket.com. Find 5 star hotels, 4 star hotels, 3 star hotels, until 1 star hotels with special discount & amenities!

propertyType.title: Rent {{property_type}} with Special Promos & Discounts
propertyType.description: Rent {{property_type}} on tiket.com. Find other {{property_type}} in your destination with the best discounts & facilities!

priceDetailCashbackInfoBanner.newVariant: Yay! You’ll get {{tixPointsCashbackValue}} cashback points, so it’s like paying {{priceAfterCashback}} (after cashback).

notFound.title: Looks like you’re lost
notFound.description: We didn't find the page you were looking for. (404)

general.title: Sorry, there is a problem
general.description: Just relax, we are working to solve it as quickly as possible. Please try again later.

noInternet.title: You need an internet connection
noInternet.description: Check your Wi-Fi, data package, cellular service, or tap "Reload".

generalError.title: Sorry, there is a problem
generalError.description: Stay calm, we are working to solve it. Please try again!

serverError.title: Please wait. Improvements are being made
serverError.description: Currently, we are improving our system to give you a better experience.

geolocationOfflineError.title: Turn on location service
geolocationOfflineError.description: To get better recommendations based on your location, let's turn on the location service permission in your device.

noDestinationError.title: Select your destination
noDestinationError.description: Let us know your dream destination so we can recommend the best accommodations for you.

roomUnavailable.title: All rooms are fully booked
roomUnavailable.description: Other t-mates just booked all of your selected rooms. It’s okay! You can change your search to check other rooms or hotels.

priceChanged.title: The price has been updated
priceChanged.description: The total price has changed from {{oldPrice}} to {{newPrice}}. Continue your booking and check the price details on the payment page.

b2bLoginNeeded.title: Your email is already registered. Let's log in!
b2bLoginNeeded.description: The email address you entered in the Contact Details field is already registered as a corporate account. Log in now to continue your booking as a corporate account.

b2bLoginNeededMultiOrder.title: Your email is already registered as a corporate account
b2bLoginNeededMultiOrder.description:
Corporate users cannot book multiple room types. If you want to continue with this account, you can only book 1 room type.

If you wish to book multiple room types, you can input another email in the Contact Details field.
b2bLoginNeededMultiOrder.primaryButton: Log in and book 1 room type

retry.title: Failed to the check room availability
retry.description: Please return to the room list and reselect your desired room.

label.general: Get a lower price if you log in!
label.memberOnly: Get a special price if you log in!

nudgeAndInfinityLabel.general: Get a lower price + {{infinityLabel}} if you log in!
nudgeAndInfinityLabel.memberOnly: Get a special price + {{infinityLabel}} if you log in!

loginBanner.label: Log in to enjoy the benefits!

detailItem.first: Property type such as Villa, Apartment, Glamping, Cruise, etc.
detailItem.second: The flower icon represents the property's facility rating based on a few criteria, such as property size and the overall facilities and services.

banner.descriptionDesktop: To help you choose the best place to stay.
banner.descriptionMobile: New! Villas & Apt. Quality Rating, to help you choose the best place to stay.

highlight1stCard.title: Found it! This is the stay you wanted.

figureNoData.title: Let's change your keyword!
figureNoData.description: No results match your search. Try different keywords and make sure to spell them correctly.

awardLabel.title: Top Hotel/Top Stay
awardLabel.description: Popular accommodation with a low complaint rate, good review, and fast response rate.

hotel.title: Hotel Star Rating
hotel.description: Ranging from 1 to 5 stars, this official standard indicates the hotel's quality, facilities, and level of service.

nha.title: Villas & Apt. Flower Rating
nha.description: Represents the tiket.com facility's rating based on a few criteria, such as property size and the overall facilities and services.

infinityPromoLabel.discountAndCashback: Use {{promoCode}}, get discount + cashback up to {{value}}

payAtHotel.title: No Prepayment Needed
payAtHotel.descWithoutCC: Book now, pay in local currency upon check-in. Credit card is not required to guarantee the booking.
payAtHotel.descWithCC: Book now, pay in local currency upon check-in. Credit card is required to guarantee the booking, but you will not be charged yet.

propertyRatingTooltip.hotelDesc: Ranging from 1 to 5 stars, this official standard indicates the hotel's quality, facilities, and level of service.
propertyRatingTooltip.nhaDesc: Represents the tiket.com facility’s rating based on a few criteria, such as property size and the overall facilities and services.

figureNoData.description: No results match your search. Try different keywords and make sure to spell them correctly.

errorMaxStay.title: Maximum stay duration is

priceDetail.title: Price Details

approximatePriceInNCurrency.title: Approximate Price in {{currencyCode}}
approximatePriceInNCurrency.footer: Note: The exchange rate may be different when you check in.

priceDetail.approximatePriceInLocalCurrency: Approximate in local currency {{localPrice}}. The exchange rate might change on your travel date.

sharedPriceFooter.phoneVerificationBanner: Don't lose {{tiketPoints}} points from this transaction. Verify your mobile number on the payment page.

priceDetail.title: Price Details

priceDetail.refundDetail: Refunds for Add-ons price from the previous booking will be returned via:

tnc.title: Terms & Conditions
tnc.prefix: By pressing  the button below, you agree to our

addOnRefund.paymentDescription: A refund of {{amount}} will be sent to your bank account.

success.title: Yay! The booking was successful

confirmationPopup.title: Continue to book this room?
confirmationPopup.description: Make sure the room you've selected and the booking details are correct.

error.errorAgreementChecked: Please tick above to agree with Terms & Conditions

refundModule.addBankAccountLabel: Please add or select a bank account

refundMethod.description: A refund of {{refundAmount}} will be sent to your {{refundMethod}}.
refundMethod.partial_description: A partial refund of {{refundAmount}} will be sent to your {{refundMethod}}.

bankNotFound.description: No results match your search. Try different keywords and make sure to spell them correctly.

localBankAccountForm.title: Bank Account Details
localBankAccountForm.checkAgreementLabel: Save your bank account information for more convenience on the next payment.

errorInputText.bankNameEmpty: Please fill in the bank name
errorInputText.accountNumberEmpty: Please fill in the account number
errorInputText.accountHolderNameEmpty: Please fill in the account holder name
errorInputText.accountNumberDuplicated: The account number you entered is already saved.
errorInputText.accountNumberNumericOnly: Must consist of numbers, without symbols and letters.
errorInputText.accountNumberNotValid: Please enter a valid account number.

localBankAccountForm.successSaveNewBankAccount: Yay, you’ve saved a new bank account.

otherOptions.bookNewRoomAtAnotherHotel: Book New Room at Another Hotel

available.title: The rooms above don't meet your criteria?
available.subtitle: Let's check the rooms at other hotels that are similar and near the previous hotel.

notAvailable.title: The rooms above don’t meet your criteria?
notAvailable.subtitle: You can request a refund for this booking, then find the hotel you want and make a new booking.

available.title: Want to see the previous hotel?
available.subtitle: If you haven’t found another hotel that meets your criteria, you can check out rooms at the previous hotel.

notAvailable.title: The rooms above don’t meet your criteria?
notAvailable.subtitle: You can request a refund for this booking, then find the hotel you want and make a new booking.

noRoomResult.title: This hotel is fully booked
noRoomResult.subtitle: All rooms in this hotel have been booked by other guests. Don’t worry, you can book a room at nearby hotels.

childrenRateOff.title: Rebooking request can't be processed
childrenRateOff.description: In the previous booking, you selected a room for guests with children. However, that room types  are currently unavailable.

ssrrNotAllowed.title: We will help you book a new room
ssrrNotAllowed.description: Please contact our Customer Care to book a new room, or request a refund for the previous booking.

alreadyRebookedAndRelocated.title: New room booking has been made
alreadyRebookedAndRelocated.description: Let's check the status of your new booking on the Your Orders page!

prebookError.title: The booking process was unsuccessful
prebookError.description: You can book a new room at the previous accommodation or other accommodations.

unsuccessfulBooking.title: The booking was unsuccessful
unsuccessfulBooking.description: A system error occurred. Please contact our Customer Care to book a new room, or request a refund for the previous booking.

tryAgainUnsuccessfulBooking.title: The booking was unsuccessful. Let's try again!
tryAgainUnsuccessfulBooking.description: A system error occurred. Don't worry! You can book a new room.

refundInProcess.title: Refund for this order is being processed
refundInProcess.description: You have requested a refund for this order. Check the status update on the Refund List.

roomFullUnavailable.title: The booking was unsuccessful
roomFullUnavailable.description: The room you selected is already booked. Don't worry! You can book another room.

roomFullUnavailableMaxAttempt.title: The booking was unsuccessful
roomFullUnavailableMaxAttempt.description: The room you selected is already booked. Please contact our Customer Care to book a new room, or request a refund for the previous booking.

priceChanged.title: The booking was unsuccessful
priceChanged.description: The price of the room you selected has changed. Don't worry! You can book another room.

priceChangedMaxAttempt.title: The booking was unsuccessful
priceChangedMaxAttempt.description: The price of the room you selected has changed. Please contact our Customer Care to book a new room, or request a refund for the previous booking.

rebookingInProcess.title: The new room booking is being processed
rebookingInProcess.description: The new room booking request has been submitted. You can check the status of your new booking on the Your Orders page.

errorMessage.roomSoldOut: The previous room has been sold out. Don’t worry, you can try again to book another room.
errorMessage.roomSoldOutUnavailable: The previous room has been sold out. Don't worry, you can contact our Customer Care to book again, or request a refund for this booking.
errorMessage.systemError: There is an unexpected problem occurred. Don’t worry, you can try again to book another room.
errorMessage.maxAttempt: There is an unexpected problem occurred. Don't worry, you can contact our Customer Care to book again, or request a refund for this booking.
